Interface FactoryPrisera

All Known Implementing Classes:
FactoryCarovnyLesPrisera, FactoryCistinkaPrisera, FactoryLesPrisera, FactoryPotocikPrisera, FactoryPustPrisera
public interface FactoryPrisera
Je sucastou vzoru Factory na vytvaranie nepriatelov. Kazda uroven ma vlastnu factory, ktora vytvara specifickych nepriatelov. Implementacie: FactoryLesPrisera, FactoryCistinkaPrisera...
